creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
pkg-message can be improved, IMO.

It says: For Docker server support, install docker-machine.

Is docker server actually supported on FreeBSD? Last time I checked, to restore BSD support was in their TODO (Docker list BSD support after a major redesign in the past).

Their docs @ https://docs.docker.com/machine/overview says: Docker Machine is a tool that lets you install Docker Engine on virtual hosts ...

So pkg-message is misleading and ambiguous. It creates an impression that Docker server is supported, when it is not. Only installation into virtual hosts is supported.
